common.tagline: Know yourself before you seek another
common.privacyNote: Your data never leaves your device

landing.heroTitle:
This is not a dating app.
This is a mirror.
landing.heroSubtitle: A research-backed tool to help you understand yourself before one of life's most important decisions.
landing.step1Desc: Answer questions across 12 research-backed dimensions of compatibility. No right answers — only honest ones.
landing.step2Desc: Get a detailed profile of your values, priorities, and blind spots. See where you're flexible and where you're firm.
landing.step3Desc: Share your profile with a potential partner and see where you align, where you differ, and what needs conversation.
landing.whyText: Most compatibility tools tell you what you want to hear. We tell you what you need to hear — with warmth, research, and respect. This is an open-source, non-profit project. No ads, no data collection, no hidden agenda.
landing.openSourceText: This project is completely free, open-source, and collects zero data. Every algorithm is transparent. Every insight is research-backed.

quiz.title: Your Journey
quiz.intro: This quiz helps you understand yourself across 12 dimensions that research shows matter most for marriage compatibility.
quiz.honestyPrompt: Remember: this tool is only as useful as you are honest. Answer as you truly are, not as you wish to be.
quiz.dealBreakerQuestion: Is this a deal-breaker for you?
quiz.dealBreakerExplain: Would you walk away if your partner fundamentally disagreed on this?
quiz.honestyCheckText: Take a moment. Are you answering as your true self, or as who you wish you were? Both are natural — but only honesty makes this useful.

results.title: Your Profile
results.subtitle: Here's what your answers reveal about your priorities, values, and approach to partnership.
results.compromiseMapDesc: Where you're flexible and where you're firm
results.blindSpotsDesc: Areas where your stated and revealed preferences may diverge
results.importanceScore: How Much This Matters to You
results.lowConsistency: Some of your answers suggest you might be answering with your ideal self rather than your actual self. Consider retaking with radical honesty — the results will be more useful.

compare.title: Compare Profiles
compare.subtitle: See how two profiles align across all dimensions

about.title: About Hayırlısı
about.missionText: To help people make one of life's most important decisions with clarity, honesty, and the best available research.
about.researchText: Every question, scoring weight, and insight in this tool is grounded in peer-reviewed research spanning decades of marriage and relationship science.
about.privacyText: We collect absolutely no data. No analytics, no tracking, no cookies beyond localStorage for saving your quiz progress. Everything runs in your browser. Your answers never leave your device.
about.openSourceText: This entire project is open source. You can inspect every algorithm, question, and scoring mechanism. We believe transparency builds trust.
about.creditsText: Built with care by volunteers who believe everyone deserves access to research-backed relationship tools.

research.title: The Research Behind Hayırlısı
research.subtitle: Every dimension, question, and insight is grounded in peer-reviewed research

values.name: Core Values & Worldview
values.description: Religious beliefs, moral framework, life philosophy, and social values

communication.name: Communication & Conflict
communication.description: Conflict resolution style, emotional expressiveness, listening patterns

financial.name: Financial Behavior
financial.description: Spending vs. saving, debt tolerance, financial transparency

family.name: Family & Children
family.description: Desire for children, parenting philosophy, extended family boundaries

goals.name: Life Goals & Ambition
goals.description: Career ambition, geographic flexibility, lifestyle vision

intimacy.name: Intimacy & Affection
intimacy.description: Love language, affection expectations, emotional intimacy needs

household.name: Household & Daily Life
household.description: Cleanliness standards, cooking expectations, division of labor

health.name: Health & Lifestyle
health.description: Diet approach, exercise habits, mental health openness

growth.name: Personal Growth
growth.description: Willingness to change, therapy openness, feedback receptiveness

worklife.name: Work-Life Balance
worklife.description: Work hours tolerance, career vs. family priority, stress management

aesthetic.name: Aesthetic & Lifestyle Preferences
aesthetic.description: Appearance standards, home style, travel and leisure preferences
